---
name: Accessibility or SEO issue
about: Report accessibility, metadata, search, or performance concerns
title: "[A11y/SEO] "
labels: accessibility, seo
assignees: ""
---

## Issue type

- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] SEO
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Metadata/social sharing
- [ ] Other

## Summary

What needs attention?

## Page or area affected

Link, route, component, or section name.

## Current behavior

What is wrong or missing now?

## Desired behavior

What should be improved?

## Evidence or tool results

Add Lighthouse results, screenshots, audit notes, search previews, or testing details.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Issue is fixed
- [ ] Checked with relevant tooling
- [ ] Reviewed on desktop
- [ ] Reviewed on mobile
